已有作品：邻桌艾莉+五等分+辉夜+春物+式守+政宗君的复仇+路人女主+天使大人（其他暂定）
辉夜：等着吧，我会让你向我告白
有希：延续之前的爱恋吧，男友
艾莉：这次我会让你依靠我的
二乃：我一定会让你喜欢上我
式守：明明我才是女朋友

评价综漫《无用的女主和无用的修罗场》和《综漫中的刘备》"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771854665,"group_id":"7595547470537427993","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2341327908898256"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595547470537427993","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"120"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5478,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18038,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7602610274583806745","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我把这一幕给看完，感觉作者写作虽然有些青涩但基础非常好，而且可以连续日更加多更听读者的意见，也可以从文中看出这应该是作者把真实之想给写下来
书中虽然有些小毒点但问题并不大，我觉得本书最大的问题是作者把自己真实想法给写下来，读起来并不同与那些普通的二创文还是有种新颖的感受，我并不反对这种感觉，但是应该是作者把自己真实之想给写下来所以把文中一些动漫角色的性格，给我的感受就是：走在路上看到一个熟悉的人的背影上去打招呼并不是自己熟悉的脸而是一个陌生脸，有一种违和感"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770122593,"group_id":"7595547470537427993","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"努力成为“神农”中","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/1DBItsrozojShYN+XHdaHYD9S+wWrKiuKB6fd2osdy","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/119871c333a3425bbcc3b7988b7987cb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618180&x-signature=99AAkrzVFboqmjW5xnuxQFH6RSc%3D","user_id":"2341327908898256","user_name":"木神之祖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2341327908898256","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595547470537427993","book_info":{"abstract":"【综漫】+【多女主】+【日常】
